init_eqs_str: a['xfade_ctrl'] = 0; a['xpos1'] = 0; a['ycheck'] = 0; a['crossfade2'] = 0; a['crossfade1'] = 0; a['xcheck'] = 0; a['yp_hi'] = 0; a['ypos1'] = 0; a['rflux'] = 0; a['xp_hi'] = 0; a['xp_lo'] = 0; a['size'] = 0; a['yp_lo'] = 0; a['zflux'] = 0; a['mv_x']=64; a['mv_y']=48; a['nut']=0; a['stp']=0; a['stq']=0; a['rtp']=0; a['rtq']=0; a['wvr']=0; a['decay']=0; a['dcsp']=0;
pixel_eqs_str: a['xpos1']=((Math.sin(div(a['time'],2))*0.3)+0.5); a['ypos1']=((Math.cos(div(a['time'],2))*0.4)+0.5); a['size']=0.2; a['xp_lo']=(a['xpos1']-a['size']); a['xp_hi']=(a['xpos1']+a['size']); a['yp_lo']=(a['ypos1']-a['size']); a['yp_hi']=(a['ypos1']+a['size']); a['xcheck']=(above(a['x'], a['xp_lo'])*below(a['x'], a['xp_hi'])); a['ycheck']=(above(a['y'], a['yp_lo'])*below(a['y'], a['yp_hi'])); a['xfade_ctrl']=((Math.sin(div(a['time'],5))*0.5)+0.5); a['crossfade1']=((a['xcheck']*a['xfade_ctrl'])+(a['ycheck']*(1-a['xfade_ctrl']))); a['crossfade2']=((a['ycheck']*a['xfade_ctrl'])+(a['xcheck']*(1-a['xfade_ctrl']))); a['zflux']=((Math.sin(div(a['time'],2))*0.4)+0.5); a['rflux']=(Math.sin(div(a['time'],1.5))*0.8); a['zoom']=((1.0*a['xcheck'])+(a['zflux']*(1-a['xcheck']))); a['rot']=((0.00*a['ycheck'])+(a['rflux']*(1-a['ycheck'])));
